D

deleteAppButton - Variable in class controller.mainViewController
 
deleteAppointment(int) - Static method in class helper.appointmentHelper
Allows users to delete existing appointment from the database.
deleteCustomer(int) - Static method in class helper.customerHelper
This deletes a customer from the database.
deleteCustomerButton - Variable in class controller.mainViewController
